title: Settings
subtitle: Appearance theme and SwitchBot API credentials

display.heading: Display
display.themeHint: System follows your OS appearance setting.

launchAtLogin.label: Launch at login
launchAtLogin.hint: Start SwitchBotler in the menu bar when you log in.

api.heading: SwitchBot API credentials
api.storageNote: Stored in your OS secure storage (Keychain / Credential Manager / Secret Service).

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect?
disconnectDialog.description: Deletes the saved Token / Secret and disconnects from the SwitchBot API.
